headline: Carnival Corporation & plc Completes Unification of Dual Listed Company Structure and Redomiciliation to Bermuda
summary: Carnival Corporation (NYSE: CCL) and Carnival plc announced today the completion of the unification of their dual listed company structure under a single company, Carnival Corporation Ltd. (the "Company"), with Carnival plc as a UK subsidiary of Carnival Corporation Ltd. (the "DLC Unification"). In addition, Carnival Corporation also migrated its jurisdiction of incorporation from the Republic of Panama to Bermuda and changed its name to "Carnival Corporation Ltd." headline: Carnival Digital Overhaul Links AI Supply Chain To Valuation Upside
summary: Carnival Corporation & (NYSE:CCL) is rolling out a unified digital supply chain and maintenance platform across its global fleet. The program standardizes systems across eight brands and introduces advanced forecasting, AI-driven modeling, and structured change management. The transformation focuses on logistics, maintenance planning, and inventory, aiming to create a consistent operating backbone fleet-wide. Carnival Corporation & trades at $27.52, with the stock up 7.6% over the past...
